differential_diagnoses: Genetic dilated cardiomyopathy (e.g., lamin A/C mutation)
Myocardial infarction with non-obstructive coronary arteries (MINOCA)
next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies
Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death
Genetic counseling and panel testing for inherited cardiomyopathies
Assessment for cardiac sarcoidosis via PET scan
Continuation of guideline-directed medical therapy for heart failure
